summary: Tested 3 bug fixes: 1) Influencer Dashboard mobile layout - Payout section displays correctly with stacked layout (grid-cols-1), no overlapping text. 2) Tier Progress section displays 2x2 grid on mobile. 3) Voice command 'Übersetze alle Produkte' correctly recognized as translate_products action with all 5 languages (en, tr, fr, sq, ar). 4) Products API returns name_translations and description_translations for all languages.

influencer_dashboard_mobile_payout.evidence: Payout section uses grid-cols-1 on mobile (stacked layout). Labels on left, values on right. No overlapping text. 'Anfordern' button visible and properly positioned.

influencer_dashboard_mobile_tier_progres.evidence: Tier Progress section uses grid-cols-2 on mobile (2x2 grid). All 4 tiers (Bronze, Silber, Gold, Platin) visible with proper sizing (142px x 112px each). data-testid attributes present for all tiers.

voice_command_translate_products.evidence: Command 'Übersetze alle Produkte' correctly parsed as action=translate_products with parameters={languages: ['en', 'tr', 'fr', 'sq', 'ar']}. Also tested 'Die Seite soll übersetzt werden' and 'Übersetzung drücken auf andere Sprache' - all recognized correctly.

products_api_translations.evidence: Products API returns name_translations and description_translations with all 6 languages (de, en, tr, fr, sq, ar). Verified on first 5 products - all have complete translations.

text_overflow_check.evidence: No text overflow detected on mobile viewport (375px width). All text properly contained within elements.

critical_code_review_comments: InfluencerDashboard.js lines 295-307: Payout stats grid correctly uses 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3' for responsive stacked layout on mobile
InfluencerDashboard.js line 377: Tier Progress grid correctly uses 'grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4' for 2x2 grid on mobile
voice_command.py lines 119-127: translate_products command definition includes all trigger words and default languages
voice_command.py lines 808-916: translate_products execution handles both string and dict name/description formats, translates to all 5 languages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) Influencer Dashboard mobile layout uses responsive grid classes (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 for payout, grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 for tiers). 2) Voice command translation works with German commands. 3) Products have translations in all 5 languages. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_voice_translation.py for regression testing.
